top_findings.title: Main application source files missing from archive
top_findings.evidence: src/main/java/ does not exist; only src/test/java/com/example/BookApiTest.java is present. Test references App.start() at BookApiTest.java:34 and new BookDao() at BookApiTest.java:32, confirming main classes existed at build time.
top_findings.suggestion: Re-archive the run workspace to include src/main source files; without them code review and rebuild are impossible
